name: write_file
description: Write content to a file at a given path, creating the file and any intermediate directories if they do not exist. By default overwrites the file. Use append mode to add to an existing file.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to write.

content.description: The content to write to the file.

mode.description: Write mode: 'overwrite' replaces any existing content, 'append' adds to the end of the file.

encoding.description: File encoding to use when writing. Defaults to 'utf-8'.
